name: SunWest Federal Credit Union ATM
description_short: SunWest Federal Credit Union provides ATM and shared branching network access to 30,000+ surcharge-free ATMs and 5,600+ shared branches through CO-OP Financial Services.
description_long:
SunWest Federal Credit Union is a credit union that offers members access to extended banking services beyond their primary branch locations. As of March 1, 2024, SunWest itself no longer hosts shared branching transactions at its own branches, but members retain access to the broader CO-OP Shared Branching Network, which connects thousands of credit unions nationwide. The credit union emphasizes convenience and network access as core member benefits.

SunWest members can access their accounts through two primary networks: the CO-OP Shared Branching Network (5,600+ locations offering deposits, withdrawals, transfers, loan payments, and balance inquiries) and Allpoint's surcharge-free ATM network (30,000+ ATMs in the U.S., Canada, Mexico, UK, and Australia at retailers like CVS, Walgreens, Target, and Circle K). Members can locate services via phone (1.888.748.3266), online locators, mobile apps, or text. All shared branching and Allpoint ATM transactions are surcharge-free for members.

SunWest distinguishes itself through partnership with Allpoint, offering 55,000+ total ATM options across multiple countries—significantly broader geographic coverage than many regional credit unions. The credit union provides multiple access methods (phone, online, app, text) to locate services and emphasizes no usage limits on shared branching visits. However, the company explicitly notes that SunWest branches are not available for shared branching; only member institutions participate in the reciprocal network.

The service model has important limitations: members must bring their member account number and valid government ID to use shared branches, deposits may be held per SunWest's policies (not shared branch policies), and foreign ATM withdrawals beyond 5 per month incur $2 fees. Large cash withdrawals ($1,000+) should be pre-verified with specific shared branch locations. This is fundamentally a network access service, not direct banking services from SunWest itself.
pros: Access to 30,000+ surcharge-free ATMs through CO-OP network with no monthly usage limits
Allpoint network extends ATM access to 55,000+ locations across 5 countries including Canada, Mexico, UK, and Australia
Shared branching available at 5,600+ locations for deposits, withdrawals, transfers, and loan payments
Multiple convenient ways to locate services (phone, online locator, mobile app, text to 91989)
No surcharge fees for using shared branching or Allpoint ATMs for SunWest members
First 5 foreign ATM withdrawals per card per month are free before $2 per-transaction fees apply
No limit on frequency of shared branching visits
cons: As of March 1, 2024, SunWest's own branches no longer offer shared branching services to other credit union members
Members must have their account number memorized or available; shared branches cannot look up accounts by other information
Foreign ATM withdrawals beyond 5 per month per card incur $2 fees; deposits at shared branches may be subject to holds
Large cash withdrawals ($1,000+) require pre-verification with specific shared branch locations due to withdrawal limits
Third-party ATM operators (Vcom) may charge additional fees even when selecting CU Service Centers option
best_for: Credit union members who travel frequently across the U.S., Canada, Mexico, UK, or Australia and need reliable ATM access
SunWest members who live or work outside traditional branch locations and rely on shared branching for routine transactions
Customers who prefer surcharge-free ATM networks and want to avoid foreign ATM fees common with traditional banks
Individuals who need occasional access to shared branching services (deposits, transfers, balance checks) without visiting a primary branch
diagnosis: SunWest Federal Credit Union's shared branching and ATM services are best for existing SunWest members who need convenient access to cash and basic banking services outside primary branch hours and locations. The main caveat is that this is a network access service, not direct banking from SunWest itself—members should understand withdrawal limits, hold policies, and the requirement to have their account number available when using shared branches.
services: Access to 5,600+ shared branching locations through CO-OP Financial Services network
Cash withdrawals at shared branches and 30,000+ ATMs
Transfers between accounts at shared branches
Loan payment processing at shared branches
Account balance and transaction history inquiries at shared branches
Surcharge-free ATM access through Allpoint network (55,000+ ATMs in 5 countries)
ATM location finder via online portal
Mobile app for locating shared branches and ATMs
Telephone support for shared branch and ATM location assistance (1.888.748.3266)
Text-based service locator (text zip code to 91989)
Allpoint mobile app for finding international ATMs
